trade_plans.invalidation: Critical key price levels (support/resistance) are missing or invalid, preventing the definition of a precise trade plan.
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Insufficient data for a valid trade plan.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: Price enters entry zone or 1h close below $355.44 after a retest.
trade_plans.invalidation: Price closes 1h above $370.00 before entry, or funding velocity accelerates positively.
confluence_signals: Funding Velocity accelerating negative (long squeeze building)
Price pulling back from significant rally highs
OI rising + price falling (bearish conviction/liquidation cascade)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Multiple strong contrarian bearish signals (crowded longs, negative funding velocity acceleration, extreme L/S ratio) combined with price pullback and bearish OI action provide high conviction for a short squeeze/correction, contributing to a 70% win rate.
